name: 頒獎典禮武裝挾持＋身份揭露
name_en: Award Ceremony Armed Hostage / Identity Reveal
description: 反派在全球直播的頒獎典禮上帶武裝人員包圍現場，企圖公開毀滅女主，結果反被女主和父親碾壓。大場面、高賭注、全球觀眾的注視下完成逆轉。
tags: 公共場合的高賭注＋武力威脅的緊迫感＋身份揭露的戲劇性＋全球直播的放大效應

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: You think I didn't come prepared? I took enough of the Gallup family's money to hire my own army. The building's surrounded. No one leaves. ... Lay a hand on my only daughter and see what happens. ... No talent, no brains. I bought off the entire squad.
examples.context: 公共場合的高賭注＋武力威脅的緊迫感＋身份揭露的戲劇性＋全球直播的放大效應
